targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', timestamp) AS time, count(*) as value FROM events_raw WHERE event_type='query' AND timestamp >= now() - interval '24 hours' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT date_trunc('minute', timestamp) AS time, avg(response_time_ms) as value FROM events_raw WHERE response_time_ms IS NOT NULL AND timestamp >= now() - interval '1 hour' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;
SELECT query_category as metric, count(*) as value FROM events_raw WHERE event_type='query' AND timestamp >= now() - interval '30 days' GROUP BY query_category ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT count(DISTINCT session_id) AS value FROM events_raw WHERE timestamp >= now() - interval '5 minutes';

SELECT extract(dow from timestamp) as day_of_week, extract(hour from timestamp) as hour_of_day, count(*) as cnt FROM events_raw WHERE event_type='query' AND timestamp >= now() - interval '30 days' GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1,2;
